/usr/bin/cc  -target arm64-apple-ios -mcpu=apple-a8 -fcommon -fobjc-arc -ObjC -Wno-error=implicit-function-declaration -F'/Volumes/D/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk/System/Cryptexes/OS/System/Library/Frameworks' -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Volumes/D/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -rpath @loader_path -rpath @executable_path/java_runtimes/java-8-openjdk/lib -rpath /usr/lib/jvm/java-8-openjdk/lib -rpath @executable_path/Frameworks -rpath @loader_path/Frameworks -o libtinygl4angle.dylib -install_name @rpath/libtinygl4angle.dylib CMakeFiles/tinygl4angle.dir/external/gl4es/string_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/tinygl4angle.dir/external/gl4es/tinygl4angle.c.o  -F'/Volumes/D/Amethyst-iOS-25/Natives/resources/Frameworks' -framework libEGL -framework libGLESv2
